episodes.title: How most Kenyan celebrities are lured into secret cults for fame|VOAN
episodes.description: Watch as Maasai Rungu narrates in depth the misfortunes he’s faced since he refused a governor’s son offer to join a cult he has nicknamed “kichinjio” for him to be famous and successful in his comedy career and how most Kenyan celebrities have found themselves in the same dark sceme.#VOAN
